codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature scope: selector expanded to CASH+5 stablecoins via shared STABLECOINS, default pair state updated to CASH/USD1 with token-object state tracking, popular row updated to top 4, and balances for unsupported endpoints correctly render as '—'.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature metadata uses skillName 'frontend-ui-worker', but the worker reports this skill was unavailable in-session and used 'frontend-worker' instead; this can cause skill-procedure drift during execution.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/maxmohammadi/.factory/missions/79476079-9b4c-40cb-b69e-9e85801c6056/features.json:363 sets skillName to frontend-ui-worker; handoff skillFeedback deviation in /Users/maxmohammadi/.factory/missions/79476079-9b4c-40cb-b69e-9e85801c6056/handoffs/2026-03-31T22-23-47-254Z__multi-stablecoin-selector__c485f4be-1587-46be-8e16-0fe5e08f0e7c.json records fallback to frontend-worker.
